mapper.insert: insert into user_card_detail (user_card_id, user_id, card_type, card_network, last_four, expiry_month, expiry_year, provider, provider_token, provider_customer_id, cardholder_name, is_default, status, gmt_create, gmt_modified ) values (#{userCardId,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{cardType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cardIssuer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lastFour,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{expiryMonth,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{expiryYear,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, #{provider,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{providerToken,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stripeCustomerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cardholderName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isDefault,jdbcType=BIT}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{gmtModified,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.select: SELECT user_card_id, user_id, card_type, card_network, last_four, expiry_month, expiry_year, provider, provider_token, provider_customer_id, cardholder_name, is_default, status, gmt_create, gmt_modified FROM user_card_detail WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT user_card_id, user_id, card_type, card_network, last_four, expiry_month, expiry_year, provider, provider_token, provider_customer_id, cardholder_name, is_default, status, gmt_create, gmt_modified FROM user_card_detail WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = true
